nodes.name: 拼接请求参数，渠道号和日期

parameters.query:
SELECT id,retroid, uuid, order_number, express_no, create_time, delivery_status, " uuid_unique", channel, sku_code,box_id
	FROM public.mes_delivery_order_details WHERE channel='{{ $json.channel }}' AND create_time BETWEEN '{{ $json.todayStart }}' AND '{{ $json.todayEnd }}';

nodes.name: 判断查询结果是否为空

parameters.query: SELECT ordernumber,retroid FROM YFConsumer.dbo.consm_barcodebindinfo WHERE retroid ='{{ $json.retroid }}';

assignments.name: message
assignments.value: 无京东自营仓库出货！无需同步

nodes.name: 将机型挂载到出库数据
